# Bad fixture — rule #23 P5 (noun-led chronology)

## Why this plan exists

Demonstrates the noun-led forward-chronology pattern — no literal
"Slice N" reference but still predictive verb usage paired with
phase/arc/revision nouns. This dodges P1 (which anchors on Slice N)
but is caught by P5.

## §1 — Evidence census

| # | Claim | Status |
|---|---|---|
| E1 | Fixture carries noun-led chronology | verified |

## Rollout schedule

Phase 2 lands the ADR. Revision three dispatches the review to
Codex. Arc revision two advances the plan-lint rule set.
